name: handoff
description: Hand off a build or review task to another one-shot headless agent — Codex, Grok, Kiro, Claude, opencode, or Cursor — over a single uniform, fail-closed contract. `/handoff:codex-build`, `/handoff:claude-review`, etc. The prompt is fed as literal bytes (never argv), trust is scoped to the verb (read-only for review, least-write for build), and an agent that cannot run is reported as gateNotRun, never a fabricated clean.
